title: Define feature toggles for parity features
description: Create feature toggle system for all parity-enabled features. Allow incremental enablement per feature group (streaming, telemetry, memory, etc.).

title: Create migration plan document
description: Document step-by-step migration from current state to parity-enabled state. Include prerequisites, rollback points, and verification steps.

title: Plan pilot scope
description: Define pilot scope: which features to enable first, success criteria, monitoring requirements, and rollback triggers.

title: Implement rollback paths
description: Create rollback procedures for each feature group. Test rollback paths to ensure safe recovery.

title: Create pilot runbooks
description: Create runbooks for pilot execution: feature enablement, monitoring, issue resolution, and rollback procedures.

title: Create Phase 9 runbook
description: Create runbook for migration incident response: migration failures, rollback execution, pilot issues.

title: Phase 9 gate review
description: Run gate review against criteria 9.1-9.3. Document results in phase9_gating.md. Get sign-off to proceed to Phase 10.
